history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A video game character selection screen shows a skull-faced fighter standing on a platform while a grid of outfit thumbnails and UI menus fill the left side.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors or in a game lobby environment, with a dark purple background and soft, out-of-focus light spots. The main character stands on a lit platform in the foreground.

Main Subject:
A stylized human-like character stands upright facing forward, wearing a gray skull mask with dark eye sockets and an open mouth. The character has a gray head covering or hair-like tuft, with a red, spiky decoration on the top. The outfit includes a dark jacket with red inner lining, a white shirt underneath, dark pants with gold-toned cuffs or straps near the ankles, and blue slip-on shoes. A long, pale, bat-like or weapon-shaped object is attached or held at the right side. The character’s arms hang at the sides while one leg is slightly forward in a relaxed stance. A red-and-black emblem and other graphic elements are visible on the chest area.

Visual Details:
The image uses a dark purple and black color palette with bright UI panels. On the left side, there are vertical menu sections with labels and small icons, and a central grid of framed character/outfit images with red borders and glowing highlights. Some thumbnails show different colored outfits and accessories on a figure. The overall composition is split: the large character model on the right and a multi-panel selection interface on the left. The camera angle is slightly elevated toward the character, emphasizing the full-body view.

Visible Text:
FASHION
EMOTE
SKILL SKIN
POSTUR
COLLECTION
KENDARAAN
PROFILE
LAINNYA
SEMUA TIER
VAULT
No other clearly readable text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a game character customization or selection screen with a skull-masked character standing on a platform. The left side displays menu options and a grid of outfit or skin thumbnails for selection.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
